entities.name: IRON TOXICITY
entities.description: A widespread nutrient disorder of wetland rice occurring in specific soil types

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The agricultural crop affected by iron toxicity in wetland and lowland environments

entities.name: ACID SULFATE SOILS
entities.description: A type of soil associated with the occurrence of iron toxicity

entities.name: ULTISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil associated with the occurrence of iron toxicity

entities.name: SANDY SOILS
entities.description: A type of soil with low cation exchange capacity associated with iron toxicity

entities.name: CATION EXCHANGE CAPACITY
entities.description: A soil property that, when low, contributes to iron toxicity

entities.name: ACIDITY
entities.description: A soil property (moderate to high) that contributes to iron toxicity

entities.name: ACTIVE IRON
entities.description: Easily reducible iron in the soil that causes toxicity in rice

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: A soil component whose levels influence the occurrence of iron toxicity

entities.name: RICE YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of rice, which is significantly reduced by iron toxicity

entities.name: IRON TOLERANCE
entities.description: The genetic ability of rice genotypes to withstand iron toxicity stress

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The nutrient status of the soil which influences the impact of iron toxicity

entities.name: SOIL WATER AND NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Agricultural practices used to reduce the effects of iron toxicity

entities.name: PLANT NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Nutrients that play a role in the occurrence of and tolerance to iron toxicity
